race.description: Bet365 Same Race Multi Mdn Plate
race.comment: RESTLESS WIND (9) has not raced since she ran on well to be beaten a length on debut over this distance at Stawell in December. Went to the jump-outs at Ararat last week to clear out the cobwebs. The testing material based on what we saw last prep. CHEERS TO US (4) has shown abundant pace in her races of late but can't manage to finish things off. Drops back a little in trip this time which might be the key. POISED (7) ran a better race over this distance at Ararat last start when second-up from a spell. Has placed three from six at 1100m and can add to that record today. POWERING AWAY (1) is back from a 20-week break. Placed at all three runs in the maiden campaign, twice at this trip. Should come back in good order.
